GroupId.description: The identifier of the newly created group in the identity store.

IdentityStoreId.description: The globally unique identifier for the identity store.

MembershipId.description: The identifier for a newly created GroupMembership in an identity store.

UserId.description: The identifier of the newly created user in the identity store.

GroupId.description: The identifier for a group in the identity store.

DisplayName.description: The group’s display name value. The length limit is 1,024 characters. This value can consist of letters, accented characters, symbols, numbers, punctuation, tab, new line, carriage return, space, and nonbreaking space in this attribute. This value is specified at the time that the group is created and stored as an attribute of the group object in the identity store.

ExternalIds.description: A list of ExternalId objects that contains the identifiers issued to this resource by an external identity provider.

Description.description: A string containing a description of the group.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time the group was created.

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time the group was last updated.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that created the group.

UpdatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that last updated the group.

MemberId.description: An object containing the identifier of a group member.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time the group membership was created.

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time the group membership was last updated.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that created the group membership.

UpdatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that last updated the group membership.

UserId.description: An object containing the identifiers of resources that can be members.

IdentityStoreId.description: The globally unique identifier for the identity store.

UserId.description: The identifier for a user in the identity store.

UserName.description: A unique string used to identify the user. The length limit is 128 characters. This value can consist of letters, accented characters, symbols, numbers, and punctuation. This value is specified at the time the user is created and stored as an attribute of the user object in the identity store.

ExternalIds.description: A list of ExternalId objects that contains the identifiers issued to this resource by an external identity provider.

NickName.description: An alternative descriptive name for the user.

ProfileUrl.description: A URL link for the user's profile.

PhoneNumbers.description: A list of PhoneNumber objects associated with a user.

UserType.description: A string indicating the type of user.

Title.description: A string containing the title of the user.

Locale.description: A string containing the geographical region or location of the user.

UserStatus.description: The current status of the user account.

Photos.description: A list of photos associated with the user. Returns up to 3 photos with their associated metadata including type, display name, and primary designation.

Website.description: The user's personal website or blog URL. Returns the stored website information for the user.

Birthdate.description: The user's birthdate in YYYY-MM-DD format. This field returns the stored birthdate information for the user.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time the user was created.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that created the user.

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time the user was last updated.

UpdatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that last updated the user.

Results.description: A list containing the results of membership existence checks.

MemberId.description: An object that contains the identifier of a group member. Setting the UserID field to the specific identifier for a user indicates that the user is a member of the group.

UserId.description: An object containing the identifiers of resources that can be members.

MembershipExists.description: Indicates whether a membership relation exists or not.

GroupMemberships.description: A list of GroupMembership objects in the group.

NextToken.description: The pagination token used for the ListUsers, ListGroups, and ListGroupMemberships API operations. This value is generated by the identity store service. It is returned in the API response if the total results are more than the size of one page. This token is also returned when it is used in the API request to search for the next page.

Groups.description: A list of Group objects in the identity store.

NextToken.description: The pagination token used for the ListUsers and ListGroups API operations. This value is generated by the identity store service. It is returned in the API response if the total results are more than the size of one page. This token is also returned when it is used in the API request to search for the next page.

GroupId.description: The identifier for a group in the identity store.

DisplayName.description:
The display name value for the group. The length limit is 1,024 characters. This value can consist of letters, accented characters, symbols, numbers, punctuation, tab, new line, carriage return, space, and nonbreaking space in this attribute. This value is specified at the time the group is created and stored as an attribute of the group object in the identity store.

Prefix search supports a maximum of 1,000 characters for the string.

ExternalIds.description: A list of ExternalId objects that contains the identifiers issued to this resource by an external identity provider.

Description.description: A string containing a description of the specified group.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time the group was created.

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time the group was last updated.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that created the group.

UpdatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that last updated the group.

IdentityStoreId.description: The globally unique identifier for the identity store.

Users.description: A list of User objects in the identity store.

NextToken.description: The pagination token used for the ListUsers and ListGroups API operations. This value is generated by the identity store service. It is returned in the API response if the total results are more than the size of one page. This token is also returned when it is used in the API request to search for the next page.

IdentityStoreId.description: The globally unique identifier for the identity store.

UserId.description: The identifier for a user in the identity store.

UserName.description: A unique string used to identify the user. The length limit is 128 characters. This value can consist of letters, accented characters, symbols, numbers, and punctuation. This value is specified at the time the user is created and stored as an attribute of the user object in the identity store.

ExternalIds.description: A list of ExternalId objects that contains the identifiers issued to this resource by an external identity provider.

Name.description: An object containing the name of the user.

Formatted.description: A string containing a formatted version of the name for display.

HonorificPrefix.description: The honorific prefix of the user. For example, "Dr."

HonorificSuffix.description: The honorific suffix of the user. For example, "M.D."

DisplayName.description:
A string containing the name of the user that is formatted for display when the user is referenced. For example, "John Doe."

Prefix search supports a maximum of 1,000 characters for the string.

NickName.description: A string containing an alternate name for the user.

ProfileUrl.description: A string containing a URL that might be associated with the user.

Emails.description: A list of Email objects containing email addresses associated with the user.

Addresses.description: A list of Address objects containing addresses associated with the user.

PhoneNumbers.description: A list of PhoneNumber objects containing phone numbers associated with the user.

UserType.description: A string indicating the type of user. Possible values are left unspecified. The value can vary based on your specific use case.

Title.description: A string containing the title of the user. Possible values are left unspecified. The value can vary based on your specific use case.

PreferredLanguage.description: A string containing the preferred language of the user. For example, "American English" or "en-us."

Locale.description: A string containing the geographical region or location of the user.

Timezone.description: A string containing the time zone of the user.

UserStatus.description: The current status of the user account.

Photos.description: A list of photos associated with the user. Users can have up to 3 photos with metadata including type, display name, and primary designation.

Website.description: The user's personal website or blog URL. This field stores website information for personal or professional use.

Birthdate.description: The user's birthdate in YYYY-MM-DD format. This field stores personal birthdate information for the user.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time the user was created.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that created the user.

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time the user was last updated.

UpdatedBy.description: The identifier of the user or system that last updated the user.
